'''Ben Davies''' (born 21 April 2000) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} or {{rlp|so}} for [[Oldham RLFC|Oldham]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

==Background==
Davies was born in [[Widnes]], [[Cheshire, England]].

Davies played junior rugby league for Halton Farnworth Hornets before switching to Widnes Moorfield.<ref name="STH 2022 Contract">{{Cite web |date=27 June 2022 |title=Ben Davies signs two year Saints extension |url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/2022/06/27/ben-davies-signs-two-year-saints-extension/ |access-date=11 February 2025 |website=St Helens R.F.C.}}</ref> He then joined the [[Widnes Vikings]] Academy.

Davies represented [[Lancashire rugby league team|Lancashire]] in their Academy Origin programme fixture against the [[Australian Schoolboys rugby league team|Australian Schoolboys]] on 1 December 2018.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Darbyshire |first=Drew |date=14 November 2018 |title=Lancashire and Yorkshire name Academy Origin squads to face Australian Schoolboys |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/lancashire-and-yorkshire-name-academy-origin-squads-to-face-australian-schoolboys |access-date=11 February 2025 |website=Love Rugby League}}</ref> He was also part of the England U18's Academy squad.<ref name="STH 2022 Contract" />

==Career==
=== Widnes Vikings ===
He made his professional début for [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] in 2019.

=== St Helens ===
Davies made his first team début for St Helens as a {{rlp|ce}} against the [[Salford Red Devils]] on 26 Oct 2020.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/54675102|title=Super League: Salford Red Devils 12-10 St Helens|work=BBC Sport |access-date=27 Oct 2020}}</ref> Due to end-of-season fixture congestion caused by the [[COVID-19 pandemic]], Saints fielded a very young side, resting the majority of first team players, in preparation of their derby match against the [[Wigan Warriors]] four days later.  In round 23 of the 2022 Super League season, Davies scored two tries in St Helens 60-6 victory over [[Hull F.C.]]<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/62493296/|title=Super League: Hull FC 6-60 St Helens - Saints confirm semi-final with 11-try demolition|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>

==== Salford Red Devils (loan) ====
On 8 June 2021 it was reported that he had signed for [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] in the [[Super League]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=8 Jun 2021|accessdate=10 Jun 2021|title=Salford sign young centre Ben Davies on loan from St Helens|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/salford-sign-young-centre-ben-davies-on-loan-from-st-helens/}}</ref>

==== Castleford Tigers (loan) ====
On 11 February 2025, it was announced that Davies would join [[Castleford Tigers]] ahead of the [[2025 Castleford Tigers season|2025 season]] on an initial two-week loan.<ref>{{Cite web |date=11 February 2025 |title=Castleford bring in Saints' Davies on initial loan |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c20gj0j7dvyo |access-date=11 February 2025 |website=BBC Sport}}</ref> The loan ended on 19 February 2025, after he played just one game for Castleford.<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=19 Feb 2025|author=Callum Walker|title=Castleford Tigers loanee returns to St Helens after just one game as Paul Wellens explains “difficult situation”|url=https://www.totalrl.com/castleford-tigers-loanee-returns-to-st-helens-after-just-one-game-as-paul-wellens-explains-difficult-situation/}}</ref>

===Oldham RLFC===
On 2 May 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Oldham RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]]<ref>{{cite web|website=St Helens|date=2 May 2025|accessdate=4 May 2025|title=Ben Davies leaves Saints to join Oldham|url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/2025/05/02/ben-davies-leaves-saints-to-join-oldham/}}</ref>
